description: A hydrologist needs to define coverage zones for water quality monitoring stations using Voronoi (Thiessen) polygons. Using the station data in /home/ga/GIS_Data/bay_area_water_stations.csv (8 stations in the San Francisco Bay Area), generate Voronoi polygons that preserve the original station attributes (station_name, ph, dissolved_oxygen_mg_l, etc.). Export the resulting polygon layer as a GeoJSON file to /home/ga/GIS_Data/exports/voronoi_zones.geojson.
